Subject: Invitation - Albuquerque Regional Meeting
Message:
This note is an invitation to the Albuquerque Region Cross Functional meeting to be held November 6th & 7th at the Sheraton Hotel in Albuquerque.  In addition, please let me know if you would like time in the agenda to share information or address any issues.  All the Regional Teams will be represented at this function.

Rooms have been blocked for the 5th, 6th & 7th but, we would ask that you make your own reservations.   (505-881-0000).

If you would like time in the agenda, I need your preferred date and the time required by October 15th.  Thank you
